transcript:
Speaker A (AI Avatar): Mera haath pakdo. [Hold my hand.]
Speaker B (Human): Hold my hand.
Speaker A: Dhairya rakho. [Have patience.]
Speaker B: Have patience.
Speaker A: Upar jao. [Go upstairs.]
Speaker B: Go upstairs.
Speaker A: Sone jao. [Go to bed.]
Speaker B: Go to bed.
Speaker A: Mujhe tumpe gussa aa raha hai. [I'm angry with you.]
Speaker B: I'm angry with you.
Speaker A: Mujhe nahi pata. [I don't know.]
Speaker B: I don't know.
Speaker A: MySivi app par mere saath Hindi mein baat karke Angrezi seekhein, woh bhi sirf ek rupaye mein. Mere saath kabhi bhi, jitni der chahein, utni der practice karein. Bolna, vyakaran, vakya banana aur sahi shabdon ka istemal, sab kuch ek hi jagah par. [Learn English by talking to me in Hindi on the MySivi app, that too for just one rupee. Practice with me anytime, for as long as you want. Speaking, grammar, sentence formation, and using the right words, all in one place.]
Speaker C (Voiceover): Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Mera haath pakdo [Hold my hand], Hold my hand, Dhairya rakho [Have patience], Have patience, Go upstairs, Go to bed, Mujhe tumpe gussa aa raha hai [I'm angry with you], I'm angry with you, I don't know, MySivi, ARYA AI Teacher, Hi Devesh! It's great to meet you! How can I assist you in improving your English today?, mein english sikhna chata hu [I want to learn English], Angrezi seekhein [Learn English], MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Then ₹299/month, Autopay, cancel anytime, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, Mere saath kabhi bhi [With me anytime], jitni der chahein [as long as you want], utni der practice karein [practice for that long], Bolna, vyakaran [Speaking, grammar], wakya banana [sentence formation], aur sahi shabdon [and correct words], ka istemal [use of], ek hi jagah par [all in one place], MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: The ad features a split-screen demonstration of an AI robot teaching English phrases to a human learner. It promotes the MySivi app, which offers an AI English teacher to help users practice speaking, grammar, and vocabulary for just ₹1. The call to action urges viewers to click 'Install Now' to download the app.
